author: Szabolcs Horvát
message: ci: use Clang 23

author: Kirill Müller
message: Ignore

author: Szabolcs Horvát
message: chore: update changelog

author: Kaixuan Li
message:
fix: validate edge target vertex IDs in graphdb reader (#2908)

The graphdb reader did not check that edge target vertex IDs fall
within the valid range [0, nodes-1]. Out-of-range IDs were silently
accepted, causing igraph_create() to expand the graph beyond the
declared node count.

message: fuzz: compare with tolerances when validating betweenness range

author: copilot-swe-agent[bot]

fix: add more missing IGRAPH_CHECK wrappers in vf2, modularity, voronoi, arpack, convex_hull, games and sir

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/igraph/igraph/sessions/131f5931-c648-4220-9123-e026e49cf9d1

Co-authored-by: szhorvat <1212871+szhorvat@users.noreply.github.com>

author: Szabolcs Horvát
message:
fix: add some missing checks on igraph_edge() or refactor to IGRAPH_FROM/TO

igraph_edge() would not actually fail in these cases
IGRAPH_FROM/TO is notably faster but igraph_edge() returns endpoints of
undirected edges in a different order, which is relevant for not changing how
various graph storage formats are written
